roi_calculation: Immediate. Automating the 90+ Auth/RBAC permutations and Infrastructure validation prevents security regression in every subsequent sprint. Manual execution would take ~12 hours/release; automation reduces this to 5 minutes/commit.
maintenance_projection: Low (2 hours/month). Auth logic is stable once defined.
infrastructure_setup: LocalStack for Cognito/AWS mocking, CI pipeline integration for Jest.
success_metrics: 100% Pass rate on JWT/RBAC Unit tests; Zero critical infrastructure misconfigurations detected by Tfsec.
risk_factors: Mocking Cognito behavior accurately in LocalStack can be complex.
mitigation_strategies: Use dedicated contract tests for Auth Service adapter.
business_value: Ensures the application is secure by default from Day 1, preventing costly security refactors later.

automation_phase: Phase 2 - Financial Integrity & AI Core Logic
roi_calculation: High. The Payout Saga and PII Redaction logic are high-risk areas. Automating these 180 cases catches potential financial loss (double-spend) and GDPR violations pre-merge. Payback period: < 1 month.
maintenance_projection: Medium (6 hours/month). Saga state machines may evolve.
infrastructure_setup: Stripe/Wise Sandbox mocks, Chaos Mesh for Saga rollback testing.
success_metrics: Zero ledger inconsistencies during chaos injection; 100% PII detection rate in automated regression.
risk_factors: Flaky tests due to async event bus timing in Saga tests.
mitigation_strategies: Implement rigorous polling/await logic for event consistency in tests.
business_value: Protects against direct financial loss and regulatory fines (GDPR).

automation_phase: Phase 3 - Data Ingestion & Vector Search Integration
roi_calculation: High. Bulk CSV import and Vector Search are performance-sensitive. Automating performance regression (k6) alongside functional logic prevents degradation as data scales.
maintenance_projection: Medium (4 hours/month). Vector search parameters often need tuning.
infrastructure_setup: Seeded RDS pgvector instance for consistent search results.
success_metrics: Vector search latency < 250ms verified in CI; CSV import handles 5k rows without event loop block.
risk_factors: Test data management for vector embeddings is complex.
mitigation_strategies: Use synthetic data generators for consistent embedding vectors.
business_value: Ensures the core value proposition (Vendor Matching) scales with data growth.

roi_calculation: Medium. UI tests are expensive to maintain but critical for user flows like 'Submit Proposal' and 'Review SOW'. ROI is realized by catching visual regressions and accessibility issues.
maintenance_projection: High (10 hours/month). UI selector changes require updates.
infrastructure_setup: Headless browser CI runner, Percy/Chromatic for visual regression.
success_metrics: Critical paths (Proposal Submission, Admin Dashboard) covered by E2E; WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
risk_factors: Flaky UI tests due to network latency or animation timing.
mitigation_strategies: Use Playwright's auto-wait and network mocking features.
business_value: Validates the actual user experience and accessibility compliance.

roi_calculation: Long-term. Automated PEN testing and load testing prevent catastrophic failures in production. ROI is measured in 'incidents prevented'.
infrastructure_setup: Dedicated performance environment mirroring prod specs.
success_metrics: Zero High/Critical vulnerabilities in ZAP scan; System sustains 1000 concurrent users.
risk_factors: False positives in security scans blocking CI pipelines.
mitigation_strategies: Tune security scanner rulesets; mark known false positives.
business_value: Final gatekeeper for Production Readiness; SOC 2 evidence generation.
